content: The question has been received o(╥﹏╥)o， I didn't notice that this function has an upper limit on the number of times it can be used, and I'm already working on a solution!
thread_title: 🔥可正常使用！【翻译器】介绍及使用教程！Channel 【Translator function】introduction and usage tutorial！

content:
V2.1.1.2 Online Maintenance Notice
  
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on March 12 at 21:05(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on March 26 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed the issue with the card selection and embedding interface in the "Forgotten Chapter."
● Fixed the incorrect text in the description of the "Primal Melody" exaltation for the Awaker "Hameln."
● Fixed the issue in "Frenzy" where unlocked character stories were not displayed due to insufficient affinity level.
● Fixed the abnormal model display of the monster "Melted Doll" in the second phase of Chapter 1 in "Stellar Chapter."
● Optimized some translation issues in the English version.
